title: RF elements TPA-RBC-XL, TwistPort adapter for RouterBOARD
category: RF elements / Wireless / Antennas / TwistPort and other adapters
description: The RF elements TPA-RBC-XL is a TwistPort adapter designed for MikroTik RouterBOARDs of the L11 , M11 , RB91x , RB92x , RB71x , RB411L and RBM11G series. The connection between the RouterBOARD and the adapter is handled using two MMCX pigtails . The adapter is made of cast aluminum, providing high mechanical durability and reliable protection for outdoor installations In addition to the cable gland for the Ethernet cable, the TPA-RBC-XL also offers three pre-molded openings for RSMA connectors, allowing the connection of additional antennas. TwistPort adapters are equipped with a quick-locking mechanism and integration into the TwistPort ecosystem ensures very low RF losses , scalability, simple deployment and easy maintenance
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors TwistPort, (2) MMCX
